speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta, chahe raat bhar neend na aayi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty frame pehle mirror karna, Lens B se role-commitment hold karna.
text: Tumhare liye rukna option hi nahi, kaam chalana hi zimmedari ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Haan, jism toot raha hai par haath nahi rok sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Time burden mirror karna, Lens D se lagatar thakan reflect karna.
text: Kaafi din se bina rukke yahi bojh chal raha hai, isliye sharir bilkul nichod sa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukne ka matlab poore parivaar ka bhookha sona
text: Subah bank se EMI bounce ka message aaya, par mere rukne ka matlab poore parivaar ka bhookha sona hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feared consequence mirror karna, Lens E se family survival risk hold karna.
text: EMI bounce ne sirf paisa nahi hilaya, ghar ke roti-paani ka darr seedha saamne khada kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sahukar ka karz aur ghar ka chula dono mujh par tike hain
text: Sahukar ka karz aur ghar ka chula dono mujh par tike hain, isi soch se seena bhaari ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short holding response dena, Lens C se family load mirror karna.
text: Karz aur chula ka pura bojh akela tumhare kandhe par aa gira...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: endurance hi ab meri kismat hai
text: Bas lagta hai endurance hi ab meri kismat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke duty words se nikalta sawal puchna taaki andar ka darr khule.
text: Jab tum bolte ho kismat, us pal sabse bada darr kis baat ka hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukne ka matlab poore parivaar ka bhookha sona
text: Darr yahi ki ek din gir gaya toh bachche bhookhe so jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Role mirror karna, Lens B se provider duty ka weight reflect karna.
text: Tum apne aap ko pehle rozi ka aadmi samajh ke chal rahe ho, baaki sab baad mein aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan chahe kitni bhi ho mujhe har haal mein pasina bahana hi hoga
text: Haan, thakan chahe kitni bhi ho, kaam chhodne ka sawaal hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based ke hisab se unspoken exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai zimmedari nibhaate-nibhaate andar se tum poore thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Bilkul, sharir bolta hai ruk ja, par dimag bolta hai hal pakad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feelings validate karna, rural-employment reality se jodna, worth separate karna.
text: Rural rozgaar mein EMI, sahukar aur ghar ka chula ek saath chalna bahut bhaari padta hai, isliye tumhara thak jana bilkul samajhne layak hai. Tumhari keemat sirf kitna kaam kiya usse nahi, tumhare hone se hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: endurance hi ab meri kismat hai
text: Thoda halka hai, par lagta hai phir wahi chakki chalegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement dena, Lens D se repeating cycle hold karna.
text: Halka hone ke baad bhi lagta hai kal se phir wahi bojh chal padega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ab kya karoon
text: Ab kya karoon, kal subah se pehle kya seedha kadam loon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 short duty-fit options dena jo 10 min ke andar ho.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) subah nikalne se pehle 2 min gehri saans, (2) kagaz par 3 line likho - aaj kitna dena hai, kal kitna kamaana hai, pehla kaam kya hai, (3) ghar mein ek bande ko seedha bolo ki aaj shaam 10 min hisaab baithna hai. Jo aasaan lage woh pakdo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Doosra wala kar sakta hoon, likhne se dimag seedha hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step chalwana for immediate clarity.
text: Pehle kagaz nikalo aur upar likho 'Kal ka hisaab'. Phir line 1: EMI/sahukar ko kitna dena hai. Phir line 2: kal ka pehla kaam kaun sa hoga. Phir line 3: shaam ko kis time hisaab dekhna hai. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sahukar ka karz aur ghar ka chula dono mujh par tike hain
text: Likha maine, ab halka sa control lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dena ki debt pressure structural hai, personal kami nahi.
text: Gaon mein EMI, sahukar aur mandi ki maar ek aadmi ko bahut zor se dabati hai. Yeh tumhari kamzori nahi, poore pranali ka dabav hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: endurance hi ab meri kismat hai
text: Sahi, par subah uthte hi phir ghabrahat aa jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning trigger ke liye 3 low-load anchors dena without new burden.
text: Subah ke liye teen anchors rakho: (1) uthte hi 6 dheemi saans, (2) kagaz ki pehli line padho, (3) pehle 30 min sirf ek kaam - khet taiyaar. Bas, baaki baad mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Yeh theek lag raha, pehle aadha ghanta seedha kaam pe rakhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen practical step reinforce karna and agency visible banana.
text: Yeh bahut mazboot kadam hai. Tum bojh ke beech bhi seedhi disha pakad rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere rukne ka matlab poore parivaar ka bhookha sona
text: Bas kabhi lagta hai sharir saath chhod dega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short holding response, Lens E se body-failure fear mirror karna.
text: Andar yeh khauf hai ki sharir thak kar ruk gaya toh sab hil jayega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan chahe kitni bhi ho mujhe har haal mein pasina bahana hi hoga
text: Haan, par ab kam se kam kal ka pehla kadam saamne hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only normalizing line dena from farmer duty world.
text: Kisan gharon mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai ghar ka aadmi toot gaya toh hausla toot jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Yeh sunke halka laga, lag raha main akela nahi is bojh mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second systemic reframe dena about structural rural debt cycle.
text: Kheti mein paisa aana-jana mausam, mandi aur udhaar se bandha hota hai, isliye dabav aadmi par asar karta hi karta hai. Isko personal haar samajhna zaroori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sahukar ka karz aur ghar ka chula dono mujh par tike hain
text: Ab dimag thoda sa seedha hai aur kagaz pe plan dekh ke sahara mil raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karna and effort ko acknowledge karna.
text: Yeh bada badlav hai. Tum thakan ke beech bhi soch ko rasta de pa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ab kya karoon
text: Theek hai, kal subah wala routine pakad lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure ke liye low-load raat ka plan dena.
text: Aaj raat mini close rakho: 1 lota pani, 5 min seedhi saans, aur kal ka kagaz takiye ke paas rakh do. Bas, itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: khet mein hal chalana toh nahi rok sakta
text: Done, kagaz rakh diya. Ab thoda mann halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein agency aur safety reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne sirf bojh nahi uthaya, usko sambhalne ka tareeka bhi pakda. Kal ka din mushkil ho sakta hai, par tumhare paas ab seedhe anchors hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek baap aur pati hone ka farz mujhe thakne ki ijaazat nahi deta
text: Ek baap aur pati hone ka farz mujhe thakne ki ijaazat nahi deta, chahe haalat toot rahi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty frame pehle mirror karna, Lens B se role-zimmedari hold karna.

coping_shade_signal: main kisan hoon aur thakna mere naseeb mein nahi

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Feeling validate karna and worth ko output se separate karna with rural context.
